sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81093" key="periapte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-απτέον</orth>, <sense id="n81093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must hang round</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cyran.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
